Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Good evening. It is now March 31st. Here are the latest news reports...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The number of Apathy Syndrome cases is down from last month, which seems to mark an end to the strange illness.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}In spite of this, surveys have shown that the public's everyday stress levels remain high.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}According to an investigation by the Ministry of Health and Welfare...[n]{f 1 1}
